text:
Update of slrn to 0.9.7.0, switching to sourceforge distribution
	Addition of IPv6 capabilities
	Change of maintainer mail address

Fix: 

The 'patch' is >40k, so I just created a tarball of the slrn dir, which
can be downloaded at:
	http://www.dohd.org/~xaa/slrn.tgz
Should there be troubles, just let me know
